generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important it is to have strong domestic security measures. Recent events show that our current laws are outdated and can't keep up with modern threats. Expanding security powers isn't about restricting freedoms—it's about protecting them. Look at how other countries handle similar situations; they've struck the right balance between safety and civil liberties. We need to update our approach to ensure we're not left vulnerable. It's our responsibility to support measures that keep our communities safe and secure.
